title: rosa pendulina var. aculeata
intro: Rosa pendulina var. aculeata, also known as the prickly rose or Rosa pendulina with thorns, is a variety of the Rosa pendulina plant species, native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This shrub-like plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of various compounds including flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rosa pendulina var. aculeata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant activity, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Rosa pendulina var. aculeata can be prepared in herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in the production of jams, jellies, and other food products.
